---
title: "Process Sexuality IAT"
author: "Seungju Kim"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Prepare
## Load Packages
```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, here, readr, haven)
```

## Import all data
```{r}
folder_path <- here("raw_data", "sexuality")

# Read all CSVs
csv_files <- list.files(folder_path, pattern = "\\.csv$", 
                        full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

csv_data <- csv_files |>
  set_names(basename) |>
  map(read_csv)

# Read all SAV files
sav_files <- list.files(folder_path, pattern = "\\.sav$", 
                        full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

sav_data <- sav_files |>
  set_names(basename) |>
  map(read_sav)

# Combine into one named list
all_files <- c(csv_data, sav_data)
names(all_files) <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(names(all_files))
```

# Examine Data
```{r}
state_props <- sex_2025 |>
  filter(!is.na(STATE)) |>
  count(STATE) |>
  mutate(
    proportion = n / sum(n),
    percent = round(proportion * 100, 2)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(n))

state_props
```

```{r}
sex_2025 |>
  filter(!is.na(STATE), !is.na(D_biep.Straight_Good_all)) |>
  group_by(STATE) |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_IAT = round(mean(D_biep.Straight_Good_all), 3),
    sd_IAT = round(sd(D_biep.Straight_Good_all), 3),
    median_IAT = round(median(D_biep.Straight_Good_all), 3),
    min_IAT = round(min(D_biep.Straight_Good_all), 3),
    max_IAT = round(max(D_biep.Straight_Good_all), 3)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(n)) |>
  slice_head(n = 5)
```

```{r}
top5_states <- sex_2025 |>
  filter(!is.na(STATE), !is.na(D_biep.Straight_Good_all)) |>
  count(STATE) |>
  arrange(desc(n)) |>
  slice() |>
  pull(STATE)

sex_2025 |>
  filter(STATE %in% top5_states, !is.na(D_biep.Straight_Good_all)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = D_biep.Straight_Good_all, fill = STATE)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, color = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ STATE, ncol = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray30") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Sexuality IAT Scores by State",
    subtitle = "Top 5 most represented states; D > 0 = implicit preference for straight",
    x = "IAT D-score (Straight = Good)",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "State"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# Create Data
```{r}
master_sex_data <- data.frame(
  year = numeric(),
  state = character(),
  mean_IAT = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
```

# Create Master Clean Dataset

```{r}
master_sex_data <- all_files |>
  map_dfr(~ .x |>
    filter(!is.na(STATE), !is.na(D_biep.Straight_Good_all)) |>
    group_by(year, STATE) |>
    summarise(mean_IAT = mean(D_biep.Straight_Good_all), .groups = "drop")
  ) |>
  rename(state = STATE)

saveRDS(master_sex_data, here("data", "sexuality_030926.Rds"))
```
